doc: Symbol-name → wiki anchor map. The backend's `symbols.py` parses `build/ladybug.map` (lwasm symbol table) to resolve addr → nearest symbol; this file then maps that symbol name to a wiki page + section anchor for the `symbol-context` UI pane. Add entries as symbols stabilise.

entry.summary: Cartridge entry point at $C002. CART → PIA2 CB1 → FIRQ handshake dispatches here from BASIC.

copyloop.summary: Boot-time self-copy loop. Empirically a no-op on XRoar 1.10; expected to work on real hardware.

blit_tile.summary: 8-row × 4-byte tile blit at stride 160. Lifts arcade char data into the 320×192×16 framebuffer.

clrfb.summary: Clear framebuffer to colour-index 0 (black). Phase 2.4 path.

mainloop.summary: Phase 2 main loop. Idle today; will host the scheduler once committed.
